## What's Changed

- Fixed the Activity page Playback History so Local and NZB playback sessions appear correctly.
- Playback History now includes currently active streams immediately, then keeps completed streams in the recent list after playback ends.
- Completed stream records now keep final offset, buffered offset, playback position, and last-activity time for better sorting and display.
- Added stream tracker test coverage for active and completed playback history.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings.
